executive_summary.decision_snapshot: Transfer only if partner award space is available for the target one-way route.
executive_summary.value_signal: Points can outperform cash pricing when taxes remain low and transfer timing is controlled.

recommendation.primary_option: Hold points until partner availability is confirmed, then transfer and book.
recommendation.booking_strategy: Check one-way partner award space first, then compare final taxes against the cash fare before moving points.
recommendation.why_this_option: This keeps flexibility while preserving upside if an award seat opens at acceptable value.
tradeoffs: Cash fare may still be better if taxes or fees are high.

options.label: Points transfer and award booking
options.strength: Potentially better value if award space is open.

fare_points_comparison.comparison_note: Use the award path only when partner space and final taxes remain favorable.

assumptions: Travel is one-way and dates are flexible within a narrow window.
No elite benefits or companion certificates are applied.

next_action.immediate_step: Check award availability for the exact one-way route before transferring points.
next_action.watch_item: Re-check taxes, fees, and transfer timing before booking.
